message:
🔧 Add ASSIGN_COPILOT toggle to auto-qa workflow (disabled) (#5121)

Gate Copilot auto-assignment behind ASSIGN_COPILOT env var
(default: 'false'). Issues are still created but no longer
auto-assigned to copilot-swe-agent. The Claude Code scanner
loop running locally picks up issues instead.

Set ASSIGN_COPILOT to 'true' to re-enable Copilot assignment.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
